claim: Verified: gathered evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness. No assumptions presented as fact, all evidence paths are usable with concrete line numbers and repo-relative paths, and no unresolved missing data remains. Explorer and cross-checker independently confirmed the implementation supports external research with proper scope separation.

evidence.summary: Agent prompts hard-code requirements: every evidence record must include scope, project facts require project-scoped evidence with repo-relative paths, external research must be marked scope=external
evidence.why: Direct enforcement in agent contracts ensures assumptions cannot be presented as project facts

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues function enforces that existing-project facts must have project-scoped evidence with concrete path locators; blocks project-scoped records without paths
evidence.why: Runtime validation prevents external evidence from satisfying project fact requirements

evidence.summary: PRD readiness validation calls evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues for completed evidence results
evidence.why: Ensures scope validation is enforced at the PRD readiness gate

evidence.summary: Dispatch allows agents full tools but harness boundary audit detects any target-project mutation; external research cannot modify project files
evidence.why: Confirms safety model prevents accidental project modifications during external research

evidence.summary: Explorer result: assumptions=[], missing=[], confidence=high, recommendation=proceed, verdict=pass with 10 evidence points
evidence.why: Explorer found no assumptions or missing data; all claims backed by project evidence

evidence.summary: Cross-checker result: assumptions=[], missing=[], confidence=high, recommendation=proceed, verdict=pass, no conflicts found
evidence.why: Independent verification confirmed explorer findings with no conflicts or gaps

risks: If scope validation logic has bugs, external evidence could incorrectly satisfy project fact requirements

result.notes: Verification complete. Explorer and cross-checker both completed with high confidence, no assumptions, no missing data, and identical verdicts. All evidence records include concrete paths and line numbers. No evidence of assumptions being presented as facts. PRD acceptance criteria is satisfied: the implementation supports external research tools marked as scope=external while requiring project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts. Harness boundary audit prevents target-project mutations. Ready to proceed.
